name: OBI-1 > 0.5 AND High Volatility Regime
hypothesis: High win-rate signals like iter000_obi1_gt_05 (WR=93.7%) may perform even better during periods of high volatility, where imbalances resolve more quickly and with greater magnitude. This spec combines the simple OBI-1 signal with a volatility regime filter to test if performance can be improved by only trading in active markets.
mutation_note: Introducing diversity. Instead of only modifying the parent spec, this combines the strong iter000_obi1_gt_05 signal with a volatility regime filter (a new axis of exploration) to see if contextual information improves predictability.
